code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn push_num(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(cur)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      nums = push_num(nums, cur)
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
nums = push_num(nums, cur)

mut out = ""
mut sum = 0
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sum}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
